title: Improvement notice issued to Lambeth London borough council
body: "This improvement notice requires Lambeth London borough council to take steps to improve its children’s social care services.  It follows a report by Ofsted, published on 12 May 2015, which judged the overall effectiveness of children’s services in the borough to be inadequate.  This improvement notice was closed on 9 May 2018. "

taxons.title: Inspection of children's social care providers
Looked-after children and children in care
